creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 203853
lv2-1.14.0 - fix python build bug and missing dependencies

After discussion on IRC, it was found that 1.14.0 in quarterly is also broken. Since 1.16.0 introduces new features, not just bug fixes, separate out unbreaking the build and the new version update.

This patch unbreaks the build suitable for MFH. This also fixes the warnings about missing dependencies in the QA check.
